examples: As boards scrutinize succession plans in response to shareholder pressure, executives who don't get the nod also may wish to move on.
The words that have mattered are efficiency, flexibility, shareholder value, business-friendly, wealth generation, sales, impact and, in newspapers, circulation.
Greece's fourth-biggest lender may call a shareholder meeting to seek approval for a 500 million- euro capital increase.
Only when the shareholder actually sells his own shares is there a taxable event.
They are speaking out at shareholder meetings, bringing lawsuits and organizing to lobby for better treatment.
